name: Maple Cream Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift the first four ingredients together; set aside.
2. Cream the oleo with the brown sugar.
3. Add the next four ingredients, adding the syrup and milk mixture alternately to the dry ingredients; beat until smooth.
4. Bake in an 8x12 inch loaf pan at 375°F for 35-45 minutes.
5. Frost as follows: Combine the syrup and butter in the top of a double boiler. When the butter is melted, gradually add sugar. Place over hot water and let stand 10 minutes, stirring occasionally. Remove from heat.
6. Beat one egg white stiff with salt added. Fold the maple mixture and spread on the cake.
